entries.summary: Test Fix + HAOS Verification (v0.2.14). Fixed TextSelectorConfig import error, updated test_options_flow.py for device picker API, fixed test_init.py version assertions. 466/466 tests passing. v0.2.14 committed, tagged, and deployed.
top_rejection_reasons: menu label mismatch with strings.json — 'RC connection' vs 'RC connecting'
lessons_learned: SelectSelectorConfig expects options as list of dicts with value+label keys, not separate lists
serial.tools.list_ports import must be lazy inside function to prevent crash if pyserial missing
HA description_placeholders may not render in options flows — need TextSelector fallback
HAOS deploy pipeline MUST be followed after every change — skill haos-deploy created to enforce it
Integration settings should be minimal — users don't need to configure ping_interval or tcp_port
